stages.prompt: Write one goal for your monthly budget (e.g., save ₹200).
List one expense you can cut to save money.
Name one need you'll prioritize in your budget.
Write one way to track your spending.
Describe one long-term benefit of budgeting.

result.winMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries! Great job planning your monthly budget!
result.lesson: Lesson: Journaling helps you plan your finances and achieve your goals!
result.loseMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries. Remember, planning your budget helps you achieve your financial goals!
result.tip: Tip: Take time to think about your financial goals and how budgeting can help you achieve them.
